rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §257.003 governs political party contribution reporting and is wholly unrelated to property tax exemptions.
quote: Sec. 257.003. REPORT REQUIRED. (a) A political party that accepts contributions authorized by Section 253.104 shall report all contributions and expenditures made to and from the account required by Section 257.002.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election code reporting requirements.
